category_sources: source_facts.description says Perl is a feature-rich programming language; official perl.org homepage and docs identify Perl as a programming language and distribution.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is perl; official homepage is perl.org and official documentation uses Perl.
docs_sources: perl.org/docs states perldoc.perl.org contains the official documentation from the Perl distributions.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; dev.perl.org source page states the Perl source is kept in Git and browsable at https://github.com/Perl/perl5.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a programming language; source_facts.executables includes perl, cpan, perldoc, and prove.
